heroTitle: Begin your journey to better health
heroDesc: Every consultation begins with listening. No rushed appointments, no dismissed symptoms — a thorough, personalised approach to your health.
discoveryDesc: A relaxed conversation to understand your health concerns and goals, explain how I work and answer your questions. No commitment.
initialDesc: A deep exploration of your health history, current symptoms, lifestyle and goals. Includes a personalised written herbal protocol, naturopathic recommendations, and formula design.
followupDesc: Assessment of your progress, adjustment of your herbal protocol and addressing new concerns. Recommended every 4 to 6 weeks.
bundleDesc: The most thorough way to begin. A deep initial consultation followed by two follow-ups to assess progress and refine your protocol.
ihmDesc: A deeply relaxing Ayurvedic treatment — 10 minutes of initial consultation and 35 minutes of massage on the head, neck and shoulders. Can be booked alone or added to an in-person consultation.

steps.title: Book your appointment
steps.desc: Choose your consultation type below and select a time that suits you using the online calendar. You'll receive an immediate confirmation by email.

steps.title: Confirm with payment
steps.desc: Transfer your consultation fee by bank transfer using the details in your confirmation email. Your appointment is secured on receipt of payment.

steps.title: Prepare & connect
steps.desc: You'll receive a short intake form and preparation notes before your appointment. We meet on video call — you just need a quiet space.

chooseDesc: Not sure where to start? The free discovery call is the perfect first step — no commitment, no pressure.
getInTouchDesc: For corporate wellness consultancy, herbal medicine workshops and Four Seasons Holistic Walks — each experience is individually tailored and priced. Get in touch to discuss.
paymentDesc: I accept payment by bank transfer — straightforward, secure, and with no processing fees for either of us.
paymentSteps: Book your appointment using the booking calendar above.
You'll receive a confirmation email with bank transfer details.
Transfer the fee within 24 hours of booking.
Your appointment is confirmed on receipt — you'll receive a final confirmation email.
paymentNotes: Bank transfer is completely free — no processing fees for you or me.
Transfers are usually processed within a few hours for same-bank transfers, or the next working day.
Please use your name and appointment date as the reference so I can match it easily.
If you have difficulty with bank transfer, please get in touch and we'll find a solution.

cancellationTiers.title: More than 48 hours
cancellationTiers.policy: Full refund by bank transfer, or rescheduling at no additional cost. Please notify me as soon as possible.

cancellationTiers.title: 24–48 hours
cancellationTiers.policy: 50% of the fee is retained. The remaining 50% will be returned to your bank account within 3–5 working days.

cancellationTiers.title: Less than 24 hours
cancellationTiers.policy: The full fee is retained. This slot was held for you and cannot be offered to someone else at short notice.

cancellationNote: Exceptions are made for genuine emergencies — please do get in touch. I understand that life happens.
finalCtaDesc: Start with a free 15-minute discovery call — no commitment, just a conversation.

consultationCards.title: Discovery Call
consultationCards.desc: A relaxed conversation to understand your health concerns and goals, explain how I work, and answer any questions. No commitment required.

consultationCards.tag: Initial · 90 minutes · Online or in person
consultationCards.title: Initial Consultation
consultationCards.desc: A deep exploration of your health history, current symptoms, lifestyle and goals. Includes a personalised written herbal protocol, naturopathic recommendations, and formula design.

consultationCards.tag: Follow-up · 30–40 minutes · Online or in person
consultationCards.title: Follow-up Consultation
consultationCards.desc: Assessment of your progress, adjustment of your herbal protocol and addressing new concerns. Recommended every 4 to 6 weeks.

consultationCards.title: Initial + 2 Follow-ups
consultationCards.desc: The most thorough way to begin. One full initial consultation followed by two follow-ups to assess progress and refine your protocol. Saves £40 versus booking separately.

consultationCards.title: Indian Head Massage
consultationCards.desc: A deeply relaxing Ayurvedic treatment — 10-minute consultation followed by 35 minutes working on head, neck and shoulders. Can be booked standalone or added to an in-person consultation.
